title: euphorbia cotinifolia subsp. cotinoides
intro: Euphorbia cotinifolia subsp. cotinoides, also known as Red Tip or Fire Sticks, is a shrub-like succulent plant belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting skin health. In herbal preparations, the plant's latex can be used to create medicinal ointments, salves, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
